'''Sarlacc Battalion B''', named after the [[Sarlacc/Legends|Sarlacc]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]], was a [[Battalion/Legends|battalion]] in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]], often led by [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[Gree (clone trooper)/Legends|Gree]]. It consisted of 576 [[Clone trooper/Legends|clone troopers]] and sorted under the [[41st Stormtrooper Legion|41st Elite]]; [[9th Assault Corps/Legends|9th Assault Corps]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1st}}
